demo_notes: No-spam in the noisiest archetype: a brand-new metrics module matches no decision scope and produces zero findings.
patch:
diff --git a/src/worker/metrics.py b/src/worker/metrics.py
new file mode 100644
index 0000000..9898989
--- /dev/null
+++ b/src/worker/metrics.py
@@ -0,0 +1,5 @@
+"""Worker throughput metrics."""
+
+
+def record(name: str) -> None:
+    _ = name
title: A noisy corpus stays silent on unrelated work
